<!-- BEGIN AUTO-GENERATED (do not edit; regenerated on each run) -->
# v3.1.0

*Published on July 23, 2026.*
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED -->

<!-- BEGIN SUMMARY (contributors: edit freely; preserved on re-run) -->
Jupyter AI 3.1 brings the in-chat controls of a modern agentic editor to collaborative chats, and moves the persona system onto a live awareness channel.

## Highlights

- **JupyterLab 4.6+ support.** Jupyter AI now works with JupyterLab 4.6+ (Jupyter YDoc v4).
- **In-chat session controls.** A new control row lets you pick which persona replies (including "no one"), and — for the active agent — switch its model, mode, and options (reasoning effort, permissions, and more) without leaving the chat.
- **Live usage and cost.** The chat input shows how full the active persona's context window is, with a hover breakdown of token usage (input, output, cache, thinking) and estimated cost.
- **Reliable persona routing.** The persona you select in the picker is always the one that responds. Personas no longer go quiet after a refresh or when a second person joins, and `@`-mentioning on every message is no longer needed.
- **Server-side notebook execution.** Cells can now run on the server via a REST API with outputs streaming to every connected client.
- **New Kilo persona** available over ACP.

## Major bugs fixed

- Fixed data loss resulting from rare race conditions after opening a file while another user was connecting to it.
- Fixed various notebook kernel and outputs issues. `jupyter_server_documents>=0.3.0` no longer ships custom kernel and outputs logic by default.
- Fixed compatibility with Voila dashboards.

## API changes

Persona session state (model, model settings, general settings, usage, and slash commands) now flows over a Yjs awareness channel instead of REST, and message routing is driven by per-message metadata rather than `@`-mentions. The old active-persona REST endpoints are removed.

`BasePersona` gains methods for the new model:

- `get_*` accessors for the persona's current model, settings, and usage.
- `report_*` methods that publish that state onto the awareness channel.
- `apply_model_spec` / `apply_settings_spec` appliers that take a user's per-message model/settings selection and apply it before `process_message`.

Custom personas should migrate to this pattern. See the [persona-manager API docs](https://jupyter-ai.readthedocs.io/en/latest/contributors/jupyter-ai-persona-manager/python-api.html).

## Jupyternaut support

Jupyternaut is supported on a best-effort basis. We have made a best effort to migrate it to Jupyter AI 3.1, but there may still be rough edges — hence the `0.1.0b0` version, which signals that more work is needed.

Jupyter AI 3.2 will generalize this: it will make it easy to build custom AI personas on the LangChain + LiteLLM stack, which should reduce the need for Jupyternaut as a distinct persona.
<!-- END SUMMARY -->

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-GENERATED (do not edit; regenerated on each run) -->
## `jupyter-server-documents`

Upgraded from `v0.2.5` → `v0.3.1`. ([See full changelog](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-server-documents/releases/tag/v0.3.1))

### Enhancements made

- Support JupyterLab v4.6 (Jupyter YDoc v4) [#264](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-server-documents/pull/264) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- Remove YRoom restart logic and adopt upstream docprovider [#251](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-server-documents/pull/251) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq), [@Zsailer](https://github.com/Zsailer))
- [Feature] Server-side cell execution via REST API [#248](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-server-documents/pull/248) ([@Zsailer](https://github.com/Zsailer), [@davidbrochart](https://github.com/davidbrochart), [@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq), [@krassowski](https://github.com/krassowski))
- Disable outputs service by default [#247](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-server-documents/pull/247) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq), [@Zsailer](https://github.com/Zsailer))

### Bugs fixed

- Send current awareness state to clients on connect [#280](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-server-documents/pull/280) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq), [@krassowski](https://github.com/krassowski))
- Address data loss during divergent client sync [#259](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-server-documents/pull/259) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq), [@Zsailer](https://github.com/Zsailer))

### Maintenance and upkeep improvements

- Add E2E test for "New Console for Notebook" output rendering [#263](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-server-documents/pull/263) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))

## `jupyter-ai-persona-manager`

Upgraded from `v0.0.11` → `v0.1.1`. ([See full changelog](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-persona-manager/releases/tag/v0.1.1))

### Enhancements made

- Title control dropdowns, fix menu keyboard navigation [#93](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-persona-manager/pull/93) ([@andrii-i](https://github.com/andrii-i), [@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- Document usage fallback semantics and scope the cost estimate label to USD [#75](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-persona-manager/pull/75) ([@andrii-i](https://github.com/andrii-i), [@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- Show a loading placeholder while the persona list resolves [#74](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-persona-manager/pull/74) ([@andrii-i](https://github.com/andrii-i), [@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- Let extensions contribute controls to the persona controls toolbar [#70](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-persona-manager/pull/70) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq), [@andrii-i](https://github.com/andrii-i))
- Move the chat input toolbar from acp-client; support percent-only context usage [#68](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-persona-manager/pull/68) ([@andrii-i](https://github.com/andrii-i), [@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- Add optional BasePersona.cancel_response() to interrupt a reply [#66](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-persona-manager/pull/66) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq), [@andrii-i](https://github.com/andrii-i))
- Define Persona and PersonaManager awareness-channel API [#64](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-persona-manager/pull/64) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- Update routing to be metadata-based, not mention-based [#59](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-persona-manager/pull/59) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- Update to python 3.10 [#55](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-persona-manager/pull/55) ([@srdas](https://github.com/srdas), [@claude](https://github.com/claude))
- Route messages to a selectable active persona [#54](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-persona-manager/pull/54) ([@andrii-i](https://github.com/andrii-i), [@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- add message handler [#53](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-persona-manager/pull/53) ([@joequant](https://github.com/joequant), [@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq), [@srdas](https://github.com/srdas))

### Bugs fixed

- Do not hide `node_modules` by default [#65](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-persona-manager/pull/65) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- Fix event loop handling and Python 3.14 compat [#46](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-persona-manager/pull/46) ([@dhirschfeld](https://github.com/dhirschfeld), [@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))

### Maintenance and upkeep improvements

- E2E coverage for persona switching and persona load failures [#91](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-persona-manager/pull/91) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- Add E2E test suite for the generic persona control surface [#71](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-persona-manager/pull/71) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq), [@andrii-i](https://github.com/andrii-i))
- Drop python 3.9, include python 3.14 [#50](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-persona-manager/pull/50) ([@brichet](https://github.com/brichet), [@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq), [@jtpio](https://github.com/jtpio))

### Documentation improvements

- Convert awareness model field comments to attribute docstrings [#89](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-persona-manager/pull/89) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- Add contributor docs + doc-marker API classification [#67](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-persona-manager/pull/67) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))

## `jupyter-ai-acp-client`

Upgraded from `v0.1.5` → `v0.2.0`. ([See full changelog](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-acp-client/releases/tag/v0.2.0))

### Enhancements made

- Drop the input controls moved to persona-manager [#140](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-acp-client/pull/140) ([@andrii-i](https://github.com/andrii-i), [@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- Cancel responses via persona-manager instead of a custom ACP stop route [#139](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-acp-client/pull/139) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq), [@andrii-i](https://github.com/andrii-i))
- Implement the persona-manager awareness API in the ACP adapter [#138](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-acp-client/pull/138) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq), [@andrii-i](https://github.com/andrii-i))
- Stamp persona/model/settings into message metadata; drop the active-persona REST [#135](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-acp-client/pull/135) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq), [@andrii-i](https://github.com/andrii-i))
- Show context, token, and cost usage for the active persona in the chat input [#133](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-acp-client/pull/133) ([@andrii-i](https://github.com/andrii-i), [@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- Add session controls and a persona selector to the chat input [#129](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-acp-client/pull/129) ([@andrii-i](https://github.com/andrii-i), [@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- Add Kilo ACP persona [#127](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-acp-client/pull/127) ([@dominikbayerl](https://github.com/dominikbayerl), [@andrii-i](https://github.com/andrii-i))

### Bugs fixed

- Fix README  [#131](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-acp-client/pull/131) ([@andrii-i](https://github.com/andrii-i), [@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))

### Maintenance and upkeep improvements

- Scope Kiro ACP workarounds to a KiroAcpClient subclass [#142](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-acp-client/pull/142) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq), [@andrii-i](https://github.com/andrii-i))
- Add E2E test harness with fake ACP agents [#137](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-acp-client/pull/137) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq), [@andrii-i](https://github.com/andrii-i))
- Remove deprecated Gemini CLI persona [#130](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-acp-client/pull/130) ([@srdas](https://github.com/srdas), [@andrii-i](https://github.com/andrii-i), [@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))

## `jupyter-ai-jupyternaut`

Upgraded from `v0.0.11` → `v0.1.0b0`. ([See full changelog](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-jupyternaut/releases/tag/v0.1.0b0))

:::{note}
This is an optional package, installed only with the corresponding `jupyter-ai` extra.
:::

### Enhancements made

- Migrate Jupyternaut onto the persona-manager model API [#70](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-jupyternaut/pull/70) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq), [@srdas](https://github.com/srdas))

### Maintenance and upkeep improvements

- Remove Dependabot lockfile workflow [#92](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-jupyternaut/pull/92) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- Gate lockfile workflow on PR author, not github.actor [#88](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-jupyternaut/pull/88) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- Fix Dependabot lockfile workflow: gate on env, not secrets context [#86](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-jupyternaut/pull/86) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- Auto-regenerate yarn.lock on Dependabot PRs [#84](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-jupyternaut/pull/84) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- Make some dependencies optional [#56](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-jupyternaut/pull/56) ([@jtpio](https://github.com/jtpio), [@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq), [@srdas](https://github.com/srdas))

### Other merged PRs

- Bump the npm-security-updates group across 1 directory with 20 updates [#87](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-jupyternaut/pull/87) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- Bump fast-uri from 3.1.3 to 3.1.4 in /ui-tests [#85](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-jupyternaut/pull/85) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- Make Dependabot config security-only [#83](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-jupyternaut/pull/83) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))
- Group Dependabot npm updates into a single PR [#81](https://github.com/jupyter-ai-contrib/jupyter-ai-jupyternaut/pull/81) ([@dlqqq](https://github.com/dlqqq))

The following subpackages did not advance their version floor in this release:

- `jupyter-ai-chat-commands` (`v0.0.4`)
- `jupyter-ai-litellm` (`v0.0.2`)
- `jupyter-ai-magic-commands` (`v0.0.3`)
- `jupyter-ai-router` (`v0.0.5`)
- `jupyter-server-mcp` (`v0.2.1`)
- `jupyterlab-commands-toolkit` (`v0.1.6`)
- `jupyterlab-notebook-awareness` (`v0.2.0`)
